# Tinderbox

A Tinderbox is a small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually dry cloth soaked in light oil) used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a [[candle]], [[lamp]], [[hooded_lantern|Lantern]], or [[torch]]—or anything else with exposed fuel—takes a [[bonus_action]]. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.
